hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm\s+(-[a-zA-Z]*f[a-zA-Z]*\s+)*-[a-zA-Z]*r|rm\s+(-[a-zA-Z]*r[a-zA-Z]*\s+)*-[a-zA-Z]*f'; then if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm\s+.*\s+(/|~|\$HOME|\.\.)(\s|$)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf on / ~ $HOME or .. is never allowed' >&2; exit 2; fi; echo 'WARNING: rm -rf detected. Verify the target path is correct before proceeding.' >&2; fi; }

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); tp=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty'); if [ -z "$sid" ] || [ -z "$tp" ] || [ ! -f "$tp" ]; then exit 0; fi; grep -q '"custom-title"' "$tp" 2>/dev/null && exit 0; msgs=$(jq -r -R 'try fromjson catch empty | select(.type=="user") | .message.content | (if type=="array" then [.[] | select(.type=="text") | .text] | join(" ") elif type=="string" then . else empty end) | select(length > 0) | select(startswith("<system-reminder>") | not) | select(startswith("/") | not) | .[:200]' "$tp" 2>/dev/null | head -15); [ -z "$msgs" ] && exit 0; export __MSGS="$msgs" __SID="$sid" __TP="$tp"; nohup timeout 60 bash -c 'NAME=$(printf "Name this coding session in 3-7 words based on the user messages below. Reply with ONLY the name. No preamble, no quotes, no explanation, no punctuation. Examples: Review auth hook diff, Debug flaky unit tests, Add user profile page

User messages:
%s" "$__MSGS" | claude -p --no-session-persistence --model sonnet 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | sed "s/^[^a-zA-Z0-9]*//" | tr -d """ | cut -c1-80); [ -z "$NAME" ] && exit 0; grep -q ""custom-title"" "$__TP" 2>/dev/null && exit 0; jq -nc --arg t "$NAME" --arg s "$__SID" "{"type":"custom-title","customTitle":\$t,"sessionId":\$s}" >> "$__TP"' >/dev/null 2>&1 & disown; exit 0 || true

ctx=''; if command -v git >/dev/null 2>&1; then changes=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -20); if [ -n "$changes" ]; then ctx="Uncommitted changes:\n$changes"; fi; fi; disk=$(df -h . 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR==2{print $5}' | tr -d '%'); if [ -n "$disk" ] && [ "$disk" -gt 90 ] 2>/dev/null; then ctx="$ctx\nWARNING: Disk usage at ${disk}%"; fi; if [ -n "$ctx" ]; then printf '{"context": "%s"}' "$ctx"; fi
